calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Set For Trial On Feb-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony D. Ross, Esq., Law Office, 323-642-7632, for Plaintiff and moving party
Elisabeth A. Madden, Esq., and Victoria Tellman, Esq., from Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, for Defendant and opposing party

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS MORDECHAI PELTA AND SARAH PELTA'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENA. The court adopts the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge Cohen as follows:
Motion to quash subpoena of Dr. Pelta's records is granted. Dr. Pelta was a pre-litigation consultant, whose materials are entitled to qualified work product protection absent good cause justifying discovery. See Weil & Brown, California Civil Procedure Before trial section 8:246 et seq. Defendants are not prejudiced by their inability to review these documents. If Dr. Pelta is later designated as an expert or to otherwise testify, his materials will be discoverable.
Motion to quash subpoena of employment records granted in part and denied in part. Defendants shall be entitled to inspect documents related to wages and other employment earnings, they shall also be entitled to inspect documents relating or referring to Mr. Pelta's physical condition and medical restrictions, if any. The court adds the following: Defendant to issue a new subpoena that comports with this order.
Plaintiff to prepare a privilege log within 10 days. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Continued To Apr-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Anthony D. Ross, Esq., of the Law Office of Anthony D. Ross, Tel. 323.642.7632, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Victoria L. Tallman, Esq., of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, Tel. 415.397.2800 appearing for Defendant Bruce MacCormack.
Caryn A. Shrier, Esq., of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, appearing for Defendant James Avery, M.D.

The parties did not stipulate to the matter being heard by a judge pro tem. PLAINTIFFS MORDECHAI PELTA and SARAH PELTA MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is continued to April 9, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Pro Tem Judge: Tom Cohen, not reported.
